meaning: n.马来群岛土人所穿的围裙,布裙
examples: He fled wearing only a sarong and a tattered shirt.
Many, both women and men wear a sarong called longyi.
Nothing says romance like an uninvited onlooker in a leopard print sarong.
Outside, he squatted down by the tracks, pulled his sarong up, and held his breath.
He brought out a dirty piece of paper from the knot on his sarong.
